title: 10 best herbal creams for hemorrhoids
description: Echinacea purpurea, also known as purple coneflower, creams helps with hemorrhoids because it's rich in anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce swelling and soothe irritated tissues. The cream's astringent properties help to constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding, while its antimicrobial properties combat bacterial and fungal infections that can exacerbate hemorrhoids.
